title: A Survey on Vision-Language-Action Models: An Action Tokenization Perspective
what_it_covers: Survey that is useful for tracing evaluation papers through the action-tokenization literature.

title: Pure Vision Language Action (VLA) Models: A Comprehensive Survey
what_it_covers: Broad survey of VLA methods, datasets, benchmarks, and simulation platforms.

title: Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotics: A Review Towards Real-World Applications
what_it_covers: Survey with evaluation-benchmark coverage and a maintained project table for VLAs in robotics.

title: vla-evaluation-harness
what_it_covers: Unified open evaluation harness plus leaderboard aggregating results across multiple VLA benchmarks.

title: LIBERO
what_it_covers: Widely used robot-manipulation benchmark that many VLA papers report on.

title: Benchmarking Vision, Language, & Action Models on Robotic Learning Tasks
what_it_covers: Evaluation framework that profiles VLA/VLM systems across 20 Open-X-Embodiment datasets.

title: VLABench
what_it_covers: Large-scale benchmark for language-conditioned robotics manipulation with long-horizon reasoning and broad task randomization.
links: Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.18194 | Repo: https://github.com/OpenMOSS/VLABench | Project: https://vlabench.github.io/

title: VLATest
what_it_covers: Automatic scene generation and fuzzing framework for testing robustness of VLA manipulation policies.

title: From Intention to Execution: Probing the Generalization Boundaries of Vision-Language-Action Models (INT-ACT)
what_it_covers: 50 simulation tasks spanning language, vision, and object perturbations to probe whether perception and planning transfer to precise execution.

title: LIBERO-PRO
what_it_covers: Plug-and-play extension of LIBERO for perturbation-based evaluation beyond memorization.

title: LIBERO-Plus
what_it_covers: Fine-grained robustness analysis for VLA models across camera, robot init, language, lighting, background, sensor noise, and scene layout.

title: VLA-Arena
what_it_covers: Systematic VLA benchmark with structured difficulty axes, safety/distractor/extrapolation/long-horizon suites, and end-to-end tooling.

title: VLA-Risk
what_it_covers: Benchmark for assessing risks of VLA models across input modalities and object/action/space attack dimensions.

title: A Careful Examination of Large Behavior Models for Multitask Dexterous Manipulation
what_it_covers: Real-world and simulation evaluation protocol with seen/unseen tasks, substantial rollout counts, and careful reporting.

title: Is Your Imitation Learning Policy Better than Mine? Policy Comparison with Near-Optimal Stopping
what_it_covers: Sequential statistical test for comparing robot policies under limited evaluation budget.

title: RoboArena
what_it_covers: Crowdsourced, double-blind pairwise evaluation of generalist robot policies across sites and environments.

title: Efficient Probabilistic Performance Bounds for Inverse Reinforcement Learning
what_it_covers: Bayesian IRL method for high-confidence bounds on policy performance when the reward is unknown.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Deep Bayesian Reward Learning from Preferences

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Safe Imitation Learning via Fast Bayesian Reward Inference from Preferences
what_it_covers: Scales Bayesian reward inference and keeps high-confidence policy evaluation practical in high-dimensional settings.

title: A Scenario Approach to Risk-Aware Safety-Critical System Verification
what_it_covers: Finite-sample scenario/VaR-based black-box safety verification for settings where tail risk matters more than mean success.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Sample-Based Bounds for Coherent Risk Measures: Applications to Policy Synthesis and Verification
what_it_covers: High-confidence sample-based bounds for coherent risk measures in robotic verification and policy assessment.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Guarantees on Robot System Performance Using Stochastic Simulation Rollouts
what_it_covers: Finite-sample bounds on expectation, VaR, CVaR, and failure probability from stochastic rollouts, including multi-hypothesis correction.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Uncertainty Aware Deployment of Pre-trained Task Conditioned Imitation Learning Policies
what_it_covers: Calibration-aware uncertainty estimation for pre-trained task-conditioned imitation policies to support safer deployment decisions.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: How Generalizable Is My Behavior Cloning Policy? A Statistical Approach to Trustworthy Performance Evaluation
what_it_covers: Confidence bounds on the full performance distribution (CDF), with explicit confidence/tightness/sample-size trade-offs from few rollouts.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Robot Learning as an Empirical Science: Best Practices for Policy Evaluation
what_it_covers: Practical guidance advocating complementary metrics, explicit statistical analysis, and stronger reporting standards for robot policy evaluation.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Confidence Calibration in Vision-Language-Action Models
what_it_covers: Systematic calibration study for VLA confidence estimates, including prompt ensembles and action-wise Platt scaling.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Efficient Evaluation of Multi-Task Robot Policies With Active Experiment Selection
what_it_covers: Frames evaluation as population-parameter estimation and uses active experiment selection to allocate scarce real-world trials.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Reliable and Scalable Robot Policy Evaluation with Imperfect Simulators
what_it_covers: Uses prediction-powered inference to combine many simulator trials with a small paired real-world set for valid confidence intervals on real performance.

section: Statistical evaluation techniques for VLA / imitation learning / behavior cloning policies
title: Beyond Binary Success: Sample-Efficient and Statistically Rigorous Robot Policy Comparison
what_it_covers: Safe anytime-valid inference for pairwise comparison under binary, partial-credit, and continuous metrics.

title: SIMPLER: Evaluating Real-World Robot Manipulation Policies in Simulation
what_it_covers: Simulation environments designed to correlate with real-world manipulation policy performance and distribution-shift behavior.

title: Real-to-Sim Robot Policy Evaluation with Gaussian Splatting Simulation of Soft-Body Interactions
what_it_covers: Photorealistic real-to-sim evaluation pipeline using Gaussian Splatting and soft-body digital twins to correlate simulated and real performance.
links: Paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.04665 | Repo: https://github.com/kywind/real2sim-eval | Project: https://real2sim-eval.github.io/

title: Robot Policy Evaluation for Sim-to-Real Transfer: A Benchmarking Perspective
what_it_covers: Benchmarking recommendations for evaluating robustness and sim-to-real alignment for generalist robotic manipulation policies.

title: Run-time Observation Interventions Make Vision-Language-Action Models More Visually Robust (BYOVLA)
what_it_covers: Weight-free runtime intervention that edits task-irrelevant image regions to improve visual robustness of off-the-shelf VLAs.

title: Ask Before You Act: Token-Level Uncertainty for Intervention in Vision-Language-Action Models
what_it_covers: Uses token-level uncertainty to decide when to ask for help or trigger intervention.

title: Evaluating Uncertainty and Quality of Visual Language Action-enabled Robots
what_it_covers: Introduces uncertainty and execution-quality metrics beyond binary task success for VLA manipulation.

section: Failure prediction / OOD detection / safe deployment
title: ARMADA: Autonomous Online Failure Detection and Human Shared Control Empower Scalable Real-world Deployment and Adaptation
what_it_covers: Shared-control deployment system with online failure detection for scalable rollout, intervention, and data collection.

section: Failure prediction / OOD detection / safe deployment
title: Can We Detect Failures Without Failure Data? Uncertainty-Aware Runtime Failure Detection for Imitation Learning Policies (FAIL-Detect)
what_it_covers: Treats runtime failure detection as sequential OOD detection and uses conformal prediction without needing failure data.

section: Failure prediction / OOD detection / safe deployment
title: Failure Prediction at Runtime for Generative Robot Policies (FIPER)
what_it_covers: Combines OOD observation detection and action-chunk entropy for early failure prediction of generative policies.

section: Failure prediction / OOD detection / safe deployment
title: From Demonstrations to Safe Deployment: Path-Consistent Safety Filtering for Diffusion Policies (PACS)
what_it_covers: Safety filter that preserves task-completing diffusion-policy behavior while adding formal safety guarantees.

section: Failure prediction / OOD detection / safe deployment
title: Real-Time Out-of-Distribution Failure Prevention via Multi-Modal Reasoning (FORTRESS)
what_it_covers: Multi-modal reasoning framework that plans semantically safe fallback strategies when a runtime monitor detects OOD hazards.
